response.justification: Excellent full-stack developer with 17+ years of proven software engineering excellence across diverse domains, but fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. Candidate has only ~6 months of formal C++ experience despite it being the primary language, and lacks any background in industrial automation, embedded systems, IoT, or industrial cybersecurity standards (SDL, IEC 62443). While clearly intelligent and capable of learning, the technical and domain gaps are substantial and would require significant ramp-up before productivity in this role.
strengths: 17+ years of production software development across web, mobile, desktop and embedded systems with proven ability to architect and deliver complex solutions
Demonstrates exceptional cross-domain expertise and architectural thinking with ability to evaluate and apply the right technology for the problem
Strong technical communication and mentoring demonstrated through workshops, open-source projects, and community engagement
concerns: Minimal C++ experience (~6 months formal work in 2014-2015) despite it being the primary language and core competency for this role
No background in industrial automation, embedded systems, IoT, or industrial control systems—the job's primary domain
No demonstrated experience with required security standards (SDL, IEC 62443) or industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA, IEC 61850)
